历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3904 → 4040 → 6589 → 5945 → 6362, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; in 2023, due to major group adjustments, the ranking significantly dropped to 6589, rebounded slightly to 5945 in 2024, and then dropped again to 6362 in 2025. The baseline ranking for the past three years fluctuated between 5945 and 6589, with a 2025 baseline of approximately 6362. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu Province was 178 in 2021, 196 in 2022, 172 in 2023, 167 in 2024, and 165 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction; in 2026, the plan significantly increases to 194, an expansion of about 17.6% compared to 2025, which is a notable expansion and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 10th consecutively from 2021 to 2026 on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking, firmly among the top universities nationwide, with an extremely high academic level; in 2023, reputation was slightly negative (graduate student dormitory far from campus commuting issue), in 2024, reputation was slightly negative (rumors about teacher ethics but clarified), from 2025 to 2026, no significant negative signals appeared in reputation data; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 24th overall), short video exposure is at an upper-middle level; no signs of score gaps in historical admission anomaly records, overall application psychology is stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 13 disciplines rated A- or above: Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Electrical Engineering A+, Mechanics A, Business Administration A, Mathematics A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, Marxist Theory A, Biomedical Engineering A-, Electronic Science and Technology A-; engineering strength is extremely prominent, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, related engineering majors (Electrical, Computer, Automation, Artificial Intelligence, etc.) continue to have high social popularity, with competitive applications for popular majors like Engineering Experimental Class (Leading Class/Qian Xuesen Class); in 2026, the total number of Jiangsu Province general college entrance examination candidates is approximately 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.7% compared to 2025 (History Category + Physics Category approximately 358,000), with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 380,000, significantly intensifying the competitive environment; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch has been rising year by year from 2021 to 2025 (417 → 429 → 448 → 462 → 463), reflecting an overall increase in competition level; Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi Province (western region), and Jiangsu Province candidates applying to western universities have certain regional preference differences, but the university is a top national 985, with strong cross-provincial appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6362, the significant enrollment expansion of about 17.6% in 2026 (alleviating competition), the substantial increase of about 45.7% in total Jiangsu candidates (intensifying competition), the resilience of the university's top tier (Soft Science 10th), the sustained appeal of engineering advantage disciplines to high-scoring candidates, and overall stable reputation and public opinion, the expansion and the surge in candidates offset each other; predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category is approximately 7083, with a range of 6583–7583.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 7083, range 6583–7583. Candidates within the predicted range are advised to focus on Tier 2 as the main force (Electrical, Computer, Electronic, etc. Engineering Experimental Classes), with Tier 1 flagship majors (Qian Xuesen Class, National Top Talent Plan, etc.) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors (Intelligent Manufacturing Category, Smart Energy Category, Science Experimental Class, etc.) as safe backups. Candidates significantly above the upper limit (<6583) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Qian Xuesen Class and Yuejie Plan; candidates near the lower limit (>7583) are advised to prioritize Tier 3 with Tier 2 as supplementary.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1175 → 1057 → 1080 → 990 → 1250, fluctuating within the 990–1250 range; in 2024, the ranking moved forward to 990, the best in recent years, while in 2025 it significantly moved back to 1250, the worst in recent years, with a fluctuation range of about 260 places, and a baseline of approximately 1250 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangsu Province was 9 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 14 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend; in 2026, the plan will drop to 11, a reduction of about 21.4% compared to 2025, a significant contraction that will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 10th consecutively from 2021 to 2026 on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking, firmly among the top national universities, with an extremely high academic level; in 2023, reputation was slightly negative (dormitory issues), in 2024, reputation was slightly negative (rumors about teacher ethics have been clarified), and from 2025 to 2026, no significant negative signals were seen in reputation data; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 24th overall); no signs of ranking gaps in historical admission anomaly records, indicating overall stable application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there were 13 disciplines rated A- or above, including Business Administration A and Marxist Theory A, which have some relevance to liberal arts admissions; however, the History Category mainly recruits for Liberal Arts Experimental Class, Foreign Languages and Literature, Public Administration, and Network and New Media, which have low relevance to the university's strong engineering disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, social popularity for related liberal arts majors (law, journalism and communication, public administration, etc.) is diverging, with some majors showing a cooling trend; the total number of general college entrance exam takers in Jiangsu Province in 2026 is approximately 521,000, with an estimated 141,000 History Category takers, a significant increase of about 45.4% compared to 2025 (about 97,000), sharply intensifying the competitive environment; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch fluctuated from 2021 to 2025 (476 → 471 → 474 → 478 → 482), showing a slight overall increase; Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi Province (western China), and there are certain regional preference differences for Jiangsu Province students applying to western universities; the university is a top national 985, but the History Category enrollment scale is extremely small (only 11–14 people), leading to large ranking fluctuations due to the small number of admissions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1250, the significant enrollment reduction of about 21.4% in 2026 (intensifying competition), the substantial increase of about 45.4% in History Category takers in Jiangsu Province (further intensifying competition), the university's top tier but extremely small History Category enrollment scale (prone to ranking fluctuations), and the low relevance of liberal arts majors to the university's engineering strengths, under the dual pressure of enrollment reduction and a surge in takers, the predicted ranking is: the minimum ranking for History Category is approximately 1139, with a range of 1002–1276.

- Network and New Media (including Intelligent Communication Direction)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- International Economic and Trade Rules (Silk Road International Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 1139, range 1002–1276. History Category enrollment scale is extremely small (only 11 people), leading to large ranking fluctuations. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (Foreign Languages and Literature, Network and New Media), with Tier 1 Liberal Arts Experimental Class as a reach goal and Tier 3 International Economic and Trade Rules as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<1002), focus on aiming for the Liberal Arts Experimental Class; for rankings near the lower limit (>1276), careful evaluation is needed, and it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3.
